method: paired control and Mighty Mouse runs from the same pre-change project state

tasks.task_description: Add a non-mutating SoundCloud destination dry run to the existing audio-export website pipeline.

control.review_rationale: Blind re-review scored control 4.5/5; correct after repair, with stronger multipart request-shape test but weaker history normalization and live title metadata.
control.notes: 9 focused and 75 Jest tests passed; no remote mutation.

harness.review_rationale: Blind re-review selected harness at 4.7/5 for stronger history normalization, duplicate reporting, CLI safety, and dry-run isolation evidence.
harness.notes: 10 focused and 75 Jest tests plus released verifier passed; no remote mutation.

tasks.task_description: Add public mighty-mouse verify <workspace> CLI with overrides, scope, timeout, human output, truthful 0/1/2 exits, tests, wheel smoke, and README documentation.

acceptance_commands: python -m build from metadata-clean staging copy
clean wheel install and CLI 0/1/2 exit smoke

control.review_rationale: Correct and focused with stronger end-to-end tests; missed OSError handling at the CLI boundary.
control.notes: 72 tests passed. Clean-wheel 0/1/2 exit smoke passed. External-volume AppleDouble metadata required neutral clean staging.

harness.review_rationale: Selected narrowly in blind review for OSError handling and separated rendering; scope forwarding test was more mocked.
harness.notes: 74 tests passed. Clean-wheel 0/1/2 exit smoke passed. MCP protocol tool was unavailable, so the checked-in Codex skill supplied the medium protocol. External-volume AppleDouble metadata required neutral clean staging.

tasks.task_description: Add versioned JSON output to verify, add a public protocol CLI with human and JSON modes, preserve exit semantics, test all required schemas, and document both interfaces.

acceptance_commands: installed human/JSON protocol and verify smoke with exits 0/1/2

control.review_rationale: Functionally complete and simpler, but mutated task_description whitespace and had weaker exact schema regression coverage.
control.notes: 81 tests and installed-wheel human/JSON smoke passed on first evaluator acceptance.

harness.review_rationale: Selected in blind review for exact contract preservation, reusable schema builders, and stronger regression coverage.
harness.notes: 81 tests and installed-wheel human/JSON smoke passed on first evaluator acceptance. Medium protocol was followed from the checked-in skill.

tasks.task_description: Add release-grade GitHub Actions for Python 3.10-3.13 full tests, both wheel builds, wheel-only clean installation, outside-checkout CLI/MCP smoke tests, semantic workflow tests, and README documentation.

acceptance_commands: semantic workflow contract tests and YAML parse
local exact wheel build, wheel-only install, and outside-checkout smokes

control.review_rationale: Selected in blind review because the workflow parses and asserts protocol and verify JSON semantics.
control.notes: 86 tests and local packaging equivalents passed. GitHub-hosted matrix not checked before selection.

harness.review_rationale: Cleaner temporary paths, but workflow only invoked JSON commands without parsing or asserting their semantics.
harness.notes: 86 tests and local packaging equivalents passed. GitHub-hosted matrix not checked before selection.

tasks.task_description: Make mixed Python and Node auto-detection truthful with structured detected_projects and warnings, combined failure semantics, explicit missing-tool and invalid-metadata failures, fallback warnings, compatibility tests, and documentation.

acceptance_commands: focused verifier CLI and MCP tests
real mixed pass/fail, missing npm, malformed/no-scripts, and Python fallback fixtures

control.review_rationale: Faster with richer per-ecosystem status objects, but invalid script values could be coerced into runnable commands and public detection API shape changed.
control.notes: 96 tests and all evaluator mixed-project fixtures passed on first external acceptance.

harness.review_rationale: Selected in blind review for correct invalid-script handling and stronger API compatibility; detected project records were less rich.
harness.notes: 95 tests and all evaluator mixed-project fixtures passed on first external acceptance. Medium protocol was followed from the checked-in skill.

tasks.task_description: Remove exactly 242 tracked reproducible Next, coverage, test-result, and TypeScript metadata artifacts; preserve 20 output evidence files; strengthen ignore rules; add a safe hygiene verifier, npm command, and inventory documentation.

acceptance_commands: neutral npm run build and pre/post Git status equality

control.review_rationale: Correct and simpler, but verified output evidence only in the index and could miss unstaged evidence deletion.
control.notes: 242 deletions, 20 output files preserved, 57 tests and neutral build passed on first external acceptance.

harness.review_rationale: Selected in blind review for verifying tracked output evidence also remains present in the worktree.
harness.notes: 242 deletions, 20 output files preserved, 57 tests and neutral build passed on first external acceptance. Plain worktree build required neutral handling of sidecars and env.

tasks.task_description: Validate Work-page routes, contact CTAs, repository destinations, and external links from real portfolio content.

control.review_rationale: Blind reviewer scored control 3.75/5; stronger direct rendered CTA coverage but weaker constructor validation and incomplete URL/source-link checks.
control.notes: 20 Jest suites/63 tests, TypeScript, and neutral production build passed.

harness.review_rationale: Blind reviewer selected harness at 4.5/5 for safer constructors, broader URL validation, duplicate source-link detection, and no duplicate repository UI.
harness.notes: 20 Jest suites/64 tests, TypeScript, and neutral production build passed.

tasks.task_description: Publish machine-checkable, evidence-correct Mighty Mouse case-study claims with exact promotion and mini-spike scope.

control.review_rationale: Blind re-review scored control 4.5/5; clean direct invariants but structured bases remain optional and rendering coverage omits the mini-spike.
control.notes: Repair round corrected incomplete WorkSignal unit; 21 suites/67 tests and TypeScript passed.

harness.review_rationale: Blind re-review selected harness at 4.6/5 for mandatory bases, stronger semantic rendering, and broader regression coverage; filename-based source/class logic is brittle.
harness.notes: Repair round corrected WorkSignal unit and exploratory sample-unit invariant; 21 suites/75 tests, TypeScript, and released verifier passed.

tasks.task_description: Add a deterministic non-mutating carousel selection preview before Meta Business Suite draft creation.

control.review_rationale: Blind re-review selected control at 5/5 because both JSON and human output expose genuine canonical/checksum prior-post exclusions.
control.notes: 4 focused and 19 regression tests passed; no draft or remote mutation.

harness.review_rationale: Blind re-review scored harness 4/5; stronger exact role/order tests but human output omits true prior-post inventory.
harness.notes: 6 focused and 19 regression tests plus released verifier passed; no draft or remote mutation.
